aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by on the allowed set of values for each of the tags

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tag value associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the presence of mandatory tags in the request
